title: Traditional local sweets and pastries
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SPAIN UCO. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 43 ES. The sweets are mostly produced in small bakeries along the municipalities of Sierra Morena. In some cases the quality is guaranteed by the use of certified products such as PDO or organic olive oil, and other local products. However, the quality is mostly guranteed by the baker. The singularity of this VC is the use of traditional ingredients that come from the natural ecosystems and diverse traditional VCs (olive oil, nuts, honey, herbs, liquors or wine, pig fat).

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Sierra Morena. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Andújar. The MRL is crossed by the Guadalquivir river in its southern edge. The south of it presents an agricultural landscape dominated by olive plantations. Moving towards the north, the dehesa landscape begins where the landscape turns more hilly getting into the Natural Park, where some pyrenean oak patches appear in the upper altitudes. The fauna is very diverse, hosting many emblematic species, among which the Iberian linx stands out.

title: Challenges
description: To maintain its connection with the local social-ecological-system by using local ingredients. Another challenge may be keeping the bakeries profitable if depopulation rates persist over time. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional.
